name: Soul
description: Autonomous thinking, emotional awareness, and memory system for OpenClaw

enabled.description: Enable soul service (background thoughts, ego state). Default: true

autonomousActions.description: Enable autonomous write operations (editing files, running shell commands). Read operations (reading logs, analyzing code) are always allowed. Default: false

thoughtFrequency.description: Thought frequency multiplier. Default: 1.0. Lower = more frequent (e.g. 0.2 for testing)

expressionFrequency.description: User-visible proactive pacing multiplier. Defaults to thoughtFrequency. Set to 1.0 while lowering thoughtFrequency to test cognition quickly without increasing message frequency

shadowThoughtRate.description: Private actionless shadow thought probability per eligible interval. Default: 0.1

cognitionMode.description: Cognitive activation mode. primary routes private thoughts through Activation while preserving operational detectors and all expression/action safety gates

checkIntervalMs.description: Thought cycle check interval in milliseconds. Default: 60000 (1 minute). Set to 300000 for 5 minutes or 1800000 for 30 minutes

cognitiveTemperament.description: Associative expansion style. balanced is the safe default; active troubleshooting always narrows automatically

expressionPolicy.description: Expression feedback policy. observe records feedback; adaptive adjusts expression timing/value only. Requires cognitionMode=primary
